description: Inserting images, ads, or async content without reserved space, causing cumulative layout shift as it loads in.
body: Failure mode: media or injected content has no width/height or aspect-ratio, so when it loads the surrounding content jumps, inflating CLS and causing misclicks. Detection signals: CLS above budget in a trace; visible content jump on load; img/iframe without dimensions; late-injected banners. Do not insert content without reserving its space. Safer fallback: set explicit dimensions or aspect-ratio, reserve a placeholder box for async/third-party content, and verify CLS stays within budget after the change.
